overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player navigates a neon-lit urban intersection with heavy holographic advertising, crosses the street, and proceeds along a sidewalk beneath an elevated overpass. The scene features futuristic dystopian architecture, moderate vehicle traffic, and scattered pedestrians in a rain-dampened cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection corner with holographic advertising

events.description: brown truck passes from right to left in front of camera
camera begins turning left to face the intersection

agents.ego_description: standing at street corner watching traffic and neon signs, then beginning to turn toward the intersection

notable_agents.action: brown truck driving past from right to left across the intersection
red sports car waiting at the traffic light

entered.detail: dark green industrial building with two metal garage doors and neon signage above
large pink and purple holographic billboard displaying female figure with text
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and rooftop structures against night sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a neon-lit street corner in a futuristic city. A green industrial building with a prominent pink holographic billboard dominates the right side while vehicles pass through the intersection. The camera stands observing the traffic before beginning to turn left toward the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection crosswalk with traffic signals

events.description: green sports car speeds through intersection from left to right
pedestrian traffic signal changes from red to green walk symbol

agents.ego_description: walking across the multi-lane intersection while vehicles pass by in both directions

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving quickly through the intersection
black sedan waiting at the red traffic light

entered.detail: yellow billboard with red text and female figure advertising food products
tall pole with traffic signals and illuminated pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the wide intersection crosswalk surrounded by passing vehicles. A yellow billboard becomes visible on the left while traffic lights control the flow of cars. The pedestrian signal changes to green as the crossing continues toward the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with street art and vendor stalls

events.description: moving from street onto sidewalk alongside building with large mural
passing by pedestrians walking in same direction ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing by a large skull mural and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk
person standing near the wall looking at the mural

entered.detail: large weathered mural of a skull with red and gold colors painted on green concrete wall
small yellow and green vendor booth with illuminated awning and signage
elevated highway or monorail track spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Now on the concrete sidewalk, the camera passes a striking skull mural on the right wall while walking toward an overpass in the distance. Street vendor stalls line the path and a few pedestrians walk ahead. The ground surface transitions from asphalt to concrete as the urban canyon narrows.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated overpass with construction barriers

events.description: walking under the overpass structure, lighting becomes dimmer and more shadowed
passing by other pedestrians on the narrow sidewalk under the bridge

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk beneath the overpass, approaching and passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in white tank top walking toward camera under the overpass
group of pedestrians walking in the distance under the overpass

entered.detail: wooden and concrete barriers lining the sidewalk edge with yellow and black stripes
thick concrete pillars supporting the elevated roadway above

segments.scene_description: The camera walks beneath the elevated overpass where the lighting becomes darker and more shadowed. Construction barriers line the right side of the narrow sidewalk while concrete support pillars rise on the left. Other pedestrians approach from the opposite direction as the path continues deeper under the bridge structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, neon-lit urban intersection into the shadowed depths of a concrete overpass. It begins at a street corner dominated by a pink holographic billboard on a green industrial building, observing traffic before turning left to enter the crosswalk. As the camera moves through the intersection, the view shifts toward a yellow billboard on the left while the pedestrian signal turns green, guiding the movement toward the opposite sidewalk. The scene then opens onto a concrete walkway where the camera passes a skull mural and street vendor stalls, moving as the urban canyon narrows toward a distant bridge. Finally, the environment transitions into a darker, more shadowed space beneath the elevated overpass, passing construction barriers and massive concrete pillars as other pedestrians approach from the opposite direction.
